✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

HLS streaming: HLS is native to AVPlayer via AVURLAsset on an m3u8 URL — no package needed for playback.

Video playback: AVPlayer/AVPlayerItem — the system media engine.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of AVFoundation? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.

Served fresh · 46 capabilities × 76 packages · 114 records · data v1

Every verdict links to the exact source line that decides it. How it works

Made refreshingly cool from Paris, France
